title: pilosella contracta
intro: Pilosella contracta, also known as Alpine Mouse-Ear or Alpine Rockrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella contracta has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health concerns. Pilosella contracta is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
